rawAssistant: This Skyglass Spire is not merely a place, but a proving ground for those who would master the true power of the relic storm. I have watched countless challengers come and go, each seeking to claim dominion over this unforgiving force. Only those who demonstrate unwavering resolve and unshakeable strength may claim the right to wield it. You, too, will be tested – are you prepared?
